title: Create: Mechanical Factory
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34c3444e2cc3bdbc634aead4eb000f517fa2703a.png)



# ⚙️ Create: Mechanical Factory

## NeoForge · Minecraft 1.21.1


### 🏭 Description

Create: Mechanical Factory is a modern, Create-based tech & factory modpack with a strong focus on automation, machinery, and exploration—optimized for controller gameplay and fully playable on the Steam Deck.

At its core is Create with a wide range of addons, enabling complex production chains, transport systems, and creative factory builds. The experience is enhanced with exploration, structure, and quality-of-life mods, keeping the world vibrant without distracting from the tech-focused gameplay.

Tested on average PCs, this modpack achieves:

Early game: 150–200 FPS

Late game: 90–100 FPS

Perfect for players who want to:

⚙️ Build mechanical factories and explore magical elements

🏗️ Fully exploit the potential of Create

🎮 Enjoy relaxed gameplay with a controller or on the Steam Deck

🚀 Experience optimized performance and a clean mod selection

🎮 Controller & Steam Deck Support

Create: Mechanical Factory is fully controller-compatible.

### Supported devices:

🎮 Xbox Controllers (One / Series)

🎮 PlayStation Controllers (DualShock 4 / DualSense)

🎮 Nintendo Switch Pro Controller

🎮 Nintendo Joy-Cons

🎮 Generic XInput Controllers

🕹️ Steam Deck (full Steam Input support)

✅ Playable out of the box
✅ Perfect for handheld, couch, or Big Picture gaming

### ⚙️ System Requirements

### Minimum (playable):

CPU: 4-core processor (e.g., Ryzen 3 / Intel i5 Gen 8)

RAM: 8 GB

GPU: iGPU or GTX 1060 / RX 580

Storage: ~5–8 GB

Java: Independent

Loader: NeoForge (21.1.217)

Minecraft: 1.21.1

### Recommended:

CPU: 6-core processor or better

RAM: 12 GB

GPU: GTX 1660 / RX 5600 XT or better

SSD recommended

(My test world is almost 800MB in size)

### Steam Deck:

###
 

###  To play the game on Steam Deck without performance drops, it is recommended to disable Distance Horizons rendering in the settings. If you encounter any problems despite doing so, please create a ticket on my Discord or leave a comment.
### 

 ###
 ###




✔ Stable performance with optimized settings

✔ All installed mods are running well 
![Steam Deck Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/841ef64f6ea8dc6f944975fc4f694e9a3c02024e_0.webp)
### 📦 Mod Highlights (Selection)

Create + Addons (Hypertube, Encased, Treadmill, LTAB, Things & Misc)

Distant Horizons

Sophisticated Backpacks

Supplementaries

Deeper & Darker

Dungeons & Taverns

Antique Atlas

Small Ships

Better Animations Collection

Embeddium & NeoCulus

Soul Gravestone

### ℹ️ Notes:

Shaders are optional (hardware-dependent)

Performance can be fine-tuned via render distance & Distant Horizons settings

Focused on tech & factory building; not hardcore balanced
